network_summary: Three Illinois GP locations operating as 'PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC' — a friendly professional corporation (Illinois-licensed PC wrapper) for the Destiny Dental DSO platform. All 3 NPIs share Simone Wilson-Adeleke as the NPPES Authorized Official, who is a corporate credentialing/admin officer for the DSO network, NOT the dentist-owner. Destiny Dental was acquired by ProSmile Holdings LLC (a TriSpan PE-backed national DSO) in August 2024. The NPPES mailing address for these NPIs resolves to ProSmile's New Jersey corporate HQ (10 Woodbridge Center Dr Ste 520, Woodbridge, NJ). All 3 locations are correctly classified as dso_regional in the database with affiliated_dso='Destiny Dental / ProSmile'. The AO-cluster signal is a corporate credentialing footprint, not a dentist multi-office owner signal.
owner_operator_identity: ProSmile Holdings LLC (DSO platform, PE-backed by TriSpan); underlying professional corporation: Pro Dental IL - Chad Wise PC; original Destiny Dental founders: Jim Lucci and Boris Labinov (pre-acquisition). Simone Wilson-Adeleke is the NPPES authorized official (likely a corporate credentialing or compliance officer), not the dentist-owner.
legal_entities: Pro Dental IL - Chad Wise PC (Illinois professional corporation, NPPES org entity)
durable_artifacts: NPI 1710714233 (Oak Park 60302): AO=SIMONE WILSON-ADELEKE, mailing 10 Woodbridge Center Dr Ste 520 Woodbridge NJ = ProSmile HQ
All 3 NPIs share org name 'PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC' — friendly-PC wrapper across 3 ZIPs
affiliated_dso='Destiny Dental / ProSmile' on all 3 location rows in practice_locations
mso_platform_pe_evidence: ProSmile Holdings LLC is a PE-backed national DSO (TriSpan, NYC/London PE firm). ProSmile completed acquisition of Destiny Dental practices in Midwest in August 2024. Sources: https://www.prosmile.com/prosmile-completes-acquisition-of-destiny-dental-practices-located-in-midwest/ and https://www.trispanllp.com/portfolio/pg-dental-holdings-llc/
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: SIMONE WILSON-ADELEKE is NOT a dentist-owner. She is a corporate AO/credentialing officer for the ProSmile/Destiny Dental DSO network. The AO reach here is a DSO administrative footprint, not a dentist multi-office ownership signal. This cluster should NOT be promoted as dentist_multi.
evidence_chain: AO signal: SIMONE WILSON-ADELEKE appears as NPPES Authorized Official on 3 NPIs across ZIP codes 60302 (Oak Park), 60438 (Lansing), 60649 (Chicago SE), all under org name 'PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC'. -> Documentary corroboration: (1) NPI 1710714233 NPPES mailing address is 10 Woodbridge Center Dr Ste 520 Woodbridge NJ — ProSmile's corporate HQ, confirming DSO centralization. (2) ProSmile press release (prosmile.com, Sept 2024) documents acquisition of Destiny Dental Midwest practices including 5 Illinois locations. (3) TriSpan (PE firm) portfolio page confirms ProSmile is a TriSpan-backed DSO. (4) Destiny Dental Care website (destinydentalcare.com/illinois/) and locator pages list Oak Park and Chicago offices under the Destiny Dental brand. All 3 locations are already correctly classified dso_regional in the database.
future_app_notes: These 3 locations are already correctly classified as dso_regional / Destiny Dental / ProSmile. No reclassification needed. Future: (1) If ProSmile rebrands these offices away from the 'Destiny Dental' trade name, update affiliated_dso to 'ProSmile'. (2) Watch for additional IL ProSmile/Destiny Dental offices that may not yet be captured. (3) Note that 'Chad Wise' in the PC name is the Illinois-licensed dentist whose PC license fronts the DSO — a standard Illinois friendly-PC structure; Chad Wise is NOT the owner/operator of the DSO.
